name: agentic-loadtesting
description: Production-replay load testing platform — simulates real traffic from WAF logs + HAR files

scripts.smoke:cds: k6 run -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_EMAIL=$TEST_EMAIL -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD apps/cds/scripts/smoke.js
scripts.smoke:cds:cloud: k6 run --out cloud -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_EMAIL=$TEST_EMAIL -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD apps/cds/scripts/smoke.js
scripts.normal:cds: k6 run -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_EMAIL=$TEST_EMAIL -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD apps/cds/scripts/normal-load.js
scripts.normal:cds:cloud: k6 run --out cloud -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_EMAIL=$TEST_EMAIL -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD apps/cds/scripts/normal-load.js
scripts.peak:cds: k6 run -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_EMAIL=$TEST_EMAIL -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD apps/cds/scripts/peak-load.js
scripts.peak:cds:cloud: k6 run --out cloud -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_EMAIL=$TEST_EMAIL -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD apps/cds/scripts/peak-load.js
scripts.stress:cds: k6 run -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_EMAIL=$TEST_EMAIL -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD apps/cds/scripts/stress-test.js
scripts.stress:cds:cloud: k6 run --out cloud -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_EMAIL=$TEST_EMAIL -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD apps/cds/scripts/stress-test.js
scripts.production:cds: k6 run -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_EMAIL=$TEST_EMAIL -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD apps/cds/scripts/production-load.js
scripts.production:cds:cloud: k6 run --out cloud -e BASE_URL=$BASE_URL -e TEST_EMAIL=$TEST_EMAIL -e TEST_PASSWORD=$TEST_PASSWORD apps/cds/scripts/production-load.js
